query:
INSERT INTO messages (
                                    sender_id,
                                    receiver_id,
                                    content,
                                    message_type,
                                    song_id,
                                    status
                                )
                                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'sent')
                                RETURNING
                                    id,
                                    sender_id,
                                    receiver_id,
                                    content,
                                    message_type AS "message_type!",
                                    song_id,
                                    status,
                                    created_at,
                                    delivered_at,
                                    read_at
